title: lathyrus sylvestris subsp. latifolius
intro: Lathyrus sylvestris subsp. latifolius is a subspecies of the vetchling plant, characterized by its broad leaflets and climbing habit. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Lathyrus sylvestris subsp. latifolius include its potential to alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and edema, as well as its ability to support cardiovascular health and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of Lathyrus sylvestris subsp. latifolius can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
